reasoning: As of mid-April 2025, Somalia's National Communications Authority granted Starlink an operational license, and Elon Musk announced on X that Starlink is 'now available' in Somalia. Reports from May 2025 also confirmed that publicly available service maps have been updated to reflect this coverage expansion. When Elon Musk tweets that service is 'now available', the Starlink Availability Map is virtually always updated concurrently. Thus, it is practically certain that the map will list parts of Somalia as 'Available' well before the July 1, 2025 deadline.
